name: Service observation sheet
description: Timestamped worksheet for capturing service touchpoints, delay points, unclear handoffs, and visible recovery failures during live observation.
source_ref: core-v2: evidence-first workflow redesign starts with observation, not memory
usage_moment: Use during a representative live service before redesigning workflow or role ownership.
expected_output: A marked-up service map with timestamps, handoff friction notes, and three highest-risk failure moments.
